productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Max Trainer Excel Purple Sports Shoes
description: Round toed purple sneakers, has a mesh upper with synthetic overlays and reinforced heel collar Central lace up fastening Padded tongue and heel collar Branding on the tongue, at the side and heel collar Nike swoosh at the side Cushioned footbed Mid sole has a transparent detail Has inbuilt FLY WIRE and AIR MAX technology Tough rubber outer with grooves Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
